author: __FILL_IN__
name: PR #1797 base + Prefix-Only Causal Bigram Mixture (eval-only)
blurb: PR #1797 (dexhunter) SmearGate + LQER Asymmetric base stack on top of PR #1787. Adds an orthogonal eval-only prefix-only causal bigram mixture: at position t, p_mix(a) = lambda(prefix) * p_nn(a) + (1-lambda(prefix)) * q_bi(a|x_{t-1}), where q_bi is a per-rank bigram tallied from already-scored tokens and lambda is a 2-scalar sigmoid gate on log1p(row_count). Training is unchanged; all gains come from the eval path. Legality: Issue #1017 conditions C1-C4 each proven by unit test in test_ngram_legality.py.
reproducibility_notes: STUB — numbers to be filled after 3-seed Day 4 run. Orthogonal knob added on top of PR #1797: eval-only NGramMixer, gated by NGRAM_MIX_ENABLED=1. No change to training, quantization, or TTT code paths. See README.md for env var table and test_ngram_legality.py for C1-C4 verifier.
